meaning: n.默认(值),缺省(值),食言,不履行责任,[律]缺席v.疏怠职责,缺席,拖欠,默认
examples: The company is in default on the loan.
On this screen, 256 colours is the default.
The default option is to save your work every five minutes.
In the big default years of 1990 to 1991 and 2000 to 2001, defaults neared 10%.
If you default on a home equity loan, the worst they can do is take your home.
